name: Registry Modification for Defense Evasion
description: Detects registry modifications that disable security features
query:
// Detect registry changes disabling security features
// Trigger on disabling Windows Defender, Firewall, UAC
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)reg\s+(add|delete).*(?i)(DisableAntiSpyware|DisableRealtimeMonitoring|EnableLUA|DisableRegistryTools|DisableTaskMgr|SecurityHealth|Windows Defender)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
